zh.lifeSummary: 當Rosina Kern於1550年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格恩可萊斯斯特勞本哈特奧頓豪森時，她的父親Conrad Kern or Kearns35歲，母親Barbara Simon37歲。她於1575年8月8日與Hans Scheffer在德國爾特波格比格奧頓豪森結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1590年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rosina Kern于1550年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格恩可萊斯斯特勞本哈特奧頓豪森时，她的父亲Conrad Kern or Kearns35岁，母亲Barbara Simon37岁。她于1575年8月8日与Hans Scheffer在德国爾特波格比格奧頓豪森结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1590年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Kern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, Dutch, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German kerne ‘kernel, seed, pip’; Middle Dutch kern(e), keerne; German Kern or Yiddish kern ‘grain’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a farmer, or a nickname for a physically small person. As a Jewish surname, it is mainly artificial.
English (southeastern): metonymic occupational name for a maker or user of milk churns, from Middle English kern, kirn, kurn, a side-form of chern ‘churn’. Compare Church .
Slovenian: nickname for a stunted person, from an old spelling of krn ‘stunted’.

variants.name: Church
meanings: English: topographic name mostly found in southern and midland England, for someone who lived near a church, or possibly an occupational name for someone who worked at a church, such as a verger or sexton, from Middle English chirche ‘church’. The word comes from Old English cyrice, ultimately from medieval Greek kyrikon, for earlier kyriakōn (dōma) ‘(house) of the Lord’, from kyrios ‘lord’. Compare Kirk .
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Kirch  .

variants.name: Kirn
meanings: German: habitational name from Kirn, a small town in Rhineland-Palatinate, the name of which probably derives from Middle High German kürne ‘mill’.
Slovenian: probably a variant of   Kern  .

variants.name: Keirn
meanings: Irish: variant of   Kern  , a shortened and altered form of   McCarron  .
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Kern  .

variants.name: Churn
meanings: metonymic occupational name for a maker or user of milk churns, from Middle English chern, chirn, churn ‘churn’. Compare Kern .
probably a variant of Churm, a nickname from Middle English chirm ‘chirping, twittering of birds’ (from Old English ci(e)rm ‘noise’), influenced by the word churn.

nameMeanings.name: Rosina
meanings: A diminutive of the name Rose, or of the Italian form Rosa

en.lifeSummary: When Rosina Kern was born in 1550, in Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, her father, Conrad Kern or Kearns, was 35 and her mother, Barbara Simon, was 37. She married Hans Scheffer on 8 August 1575, in Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 1590, in her hometown.

Elle a épousé Hans Scheffer le 8 août 1575, à Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 1590, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rosina Kern 1550 in Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Conrad Kern or Kearns 35 und ihre Mutter Barbara Simon 37. Sie hat am 8. August 1575 in Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Deutschland Hans Scheffer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1590 in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Hans Scheffer il 8 agosto 1575, nel Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì dopo il 1590, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Rosina Kernが1550年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグエンズクレイスストラウベンハートオッテンハウセンで生まれた時，父Conrad Kern or Kearnsは35歳，母Barbara Simonは37歳であった。1575年8月8日にドイツウuルッテンバーグネウエンブuルグオッテンハウセンでHans Schefferと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1590年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.Gailsbach, Neckarkreis, Württemberg, Ger: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 슈wa비슈 홀 맹하르드트 게이스바치
ko.lifeSummary: Rosina Kern(이)가 1550년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 즈크레이스 스트라벤하르드트 오텐하우센에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conrad Kern or Kearns(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Barbara Simon(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1575년 8월 8일 독일 wu르테버그 니우브u르그 오텐하우센에서 Hans Scheffer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1590년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rosina Kern nasceu em 1550, em Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Conrad Kern or Kearns, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Barbara Simon, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Hans Scheffer em 8 de agosto de 1575, em Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1590, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rosina Kern родилась в 1550 г. в местности оттенаусен, страубенардт, энзкрис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Conrad Kern or Kearns было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Barbara Simon, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hans Scheffer 8 августа 1575 г. в местности оттенаусен, неуенбuрг, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 1590 г. в её родном городе.

Se casó con Hans Scheffer el 8 de agosto de 1575, en Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió después de 1590, en su pueblo.
